name: Jelly-Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat the ham as directed on the label or at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours.
2 Remove from oven and score by cutting diagonal lines, each 1/2-inch deep and spaced 1 inch apart. Cut across the lines to form diamond shapes.
3 Combine the jelly, mustard, and horseradish in a small bowl.
4 Spoon small amounts of the mixture at intervals over the ham throughout the remainder of baking.
5 Increase the temperature to 425°F and bake until the ham is browned and glazed, about 30 to 45 minutes.
